scenarios.rationale: The operating system (RHEL 7) is assessed as EOL, so patching or upgrading is recommended.

scenarios.scenario_name: Switch to standard Linux Operating System
scenarios.rationale: The application already runs on a standard Linux distribution (RHEL 7).
The application is already deployed on AWS and uses a portable stack, so ARM-based hosting is a credible optimization option.
The application uses Apache Tomcat 6.1, which is a legacy-style middleware component worth evaluating for replacement.

scenarios.scenario_name: Application Migration to Cloud Infrastructure (Lift & Shift)

The application is already marked as containerized.
The available application data does not show a strong need for structural refactoring.
The database version for PostgreSQL 13 is not covered by the supplied lifecycle rules.

scenarios.scenario_name: Switch DB Engine to open-source database solution
